fields.summary: Provides a mutable builder for constructing <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> objects incrementally.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> provides a mutable builder for constructing <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> objects incrementally. It supports all standard path operations including lines, quadratic/conic/cubic Bézier curves, arcs, and closed contours. Call <see cref="M:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Snapshot" /> to get a read-only snapshot at any time, or <see cref="M:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder.Detach" /> to transfer ownership of the built path.

Dispose the builder when finished to release native resources.

## Examples

```csharp
using var builder = new SKPathBuilder();
builder.MoveTo(0, 0);
builder.LineTo(100, 0);
builder.LineTo(100, 100);
builder.Close();

using var path = builder.Detach();
canvas.DrawPath(path, paint);
```
]]></format>

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder ();

fields.summary: Initializes a new empty instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class.

entries.signature: public SKPathBuilder (SkiaSharp.SKPath path);

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class, copying the contents of the specified path.

params.path: The source path whose contents are copied into this builder.

entries.signature: public void AddArc (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle);

fields.summary: Adds an arc of the specified oval to the path as a new contour.

params.sweepAngle: The sweep angle of the arc in degrees.
params.startAngle: The starting angle of the arc in degrees.
params.oval: The bounding rectangle of the oval for the arc.

entries.signature: public void AddCircle (float x, float y, float radius, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Adds a circle to the path as a new contour.

entries.signature: public void AddOval (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Adds an oval (ellipse) inscribed in the specified rectangle to the path.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends the elements of the specified path to the builder.

params.other: The path whose elements are added to this builder.
params.mode: The mode specifying how the path is appended.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, in SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends the elements of the specified path, transformed by a matrix, to the builder.

params.other: The path whose elements are added to this builder.
params.mode: The mode specifying how the path is appended.
params.matrix: The transformation matrix to apply to the path before appending.

entries.signature: public void AddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other, float dx, float dy, SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode mode = SkiaSharp.SKPathAddMode.Append);

fields.summary: Appends the elements of the specified path, offset by (dx, dy), to the builder.

params.mode: The mode specifying how the path is appended.
params.other: The path whose elements are added to this builder.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (SkiaSharp.SKPoint[] points, bool close = true);

fields.summary: Adds a polygon defined by an array of points to the path.

params.close: true to close the polygon with a final line back to the first point; otherwise, false.
params.points: The points defining the polygon vertices.

entries.signature: public void AddPoly (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKPoint> points, bool close = true);

fields.summary: Adds a polygon defined by a span of points to the path.

params.close: true to close the polygon with a final line back to the first point; otherwise, false.
params.points: The points defining the polygon vertices.

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Adds a rectangle to the path.

entries.signature: public void AddRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

fields.summary: Adds a rectangle to the path, starting at the specified corner index.

params.startIndex: The zero-based corner index (0–3) at which to start the rectangle contour.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Adds a rounded rectangle to the path.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRoundRect rect, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection direction, uint startIndex);

fields.summary: Adds a rounded rectangle to the path.

params.startIndex: The zero-based corner index (0–3) at which to start the rectangle contour.

entries.signature: public void AddRoundRect (SkiaSharp.SKRect rect, float rx, float ry, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection dir = SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection.Clockwise);

fields.summary: Adds a rounded rectangle to the path.

params.rx: The x-axis radius of the arc.
params.ry: The y-axis radius of the arc.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2, float radius);

fields.summary: Appends an arc to the current contour.

params.point1: The first tangent point for the arc.
params.point2: The second tangent point and end point for the arc.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKRect oval, float startAngle, float sweepAngle, bool forceMoveTo);

fields.summary: Appends an arc to the current contour.

params.sweepAngle: The sweep angle of the arc in degrees.
params.startAngle: The starting angle of the arc in degrees.
params.forceMoveTo: <see langword="true" /> to start a new contour at the first point of the arc; <see langword="false" /> to connect the arc to the current contour with a line.
params.oval: The bounding rectangle of the oval for the arc.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

fields.summary: Appends an arc to the current contour.

params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the x-axis in degrees.
params.r: The arc radii as a point (rx, ry).
params.largeArc: The arc size flag indicating whether to use the large arc.
params.sweep: The sweep direction of the arc.
params.xy: The end point of the arc.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2, float radius);

fields.summary: Appends an arc to the current contour.

params.y2: The y-coordinate of the second tangent point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.x2: The x-coordinate of the second tangent point.

entries.signature: public void ArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends an arc to the current contour.

params.largeArc: The arc size flag indicating whether to use the large arc.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the x-axis in degrees.
params.ry: The y-axis radius of the arc.
params.rx: The x-axis radius of the arc.
params.sweep: The sweep direction of the arc.

entries.signature: public void Close ();

fields.summary: Closes the current contour by adding a line back to the starting point.

entries.signature: public void ConicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a conic curve to the current contour.

params.point1: The first tangent point for the arc.
params.w: The weight of the conic curve (affects the curve's shape).

entries.signature: public void ConicTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a conic curve to the current contour.

params.w: The weight of the conic curve (affects the curve's shape).
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.x0: The x-coordinate of the first control point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the first control point.

entries.signature: public void CubicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bézier curve to the current contour.

params.point1: The first tangent point for the arc.
params.point2: The second tangent point and end point for the arc.

entries.signature: public void CubicTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bézier curve to the current contour.

params.x0: The x-coordinate of the first control point.
params.y2: The y-coordinate of the second tangent point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the first control point.
params.x2: The x-coordinate of the second tangent point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.x1: The x-coordinate of the first tangent point.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Detach ();

fields.summary: Returns the built path and resets the builder.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> containing the path that was built.

entries.signature: protected override void Dispose (bool disposing);

fields.summary: Releases the resources used by the current instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> class.

params.disposing: <see langword="true" /> to release both managed and unmanaged resources; <see langword="false" /> to release only unmanaged resources.

entries.signature: protected override void DisposeNative ();

fields.summary: Releases the native resources used by this instance.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPathFillType FillType { get; set; }

fields.summary: Gets or sets the fill type rule for the path.

entries.signature: public void LineTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Appends a line segment from the current point to the specified point.

entries.signature: public void LineTo (float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends a line segment from the current point to the specified point.

entries.signature: public void MoveTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Sets the beginning of the next contour to the specified point.

entries.signature: public void MoveTo (float x, float y);

fields.summary: Sets the beginning of the next contour to the specified point.

entries.signature: public void QuadTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bézier curve to the current contour.

params.point1: The first tangent point for the arc.

entries.signature: public void QuadTo (float x0, float y0, float x1, float y1);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bézier curve to the current contour.

params.x1: The x-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.y1: The y-coordinate of the first tangent point.
params.x0: The x-coordinate of the first control point.
params.y0: The y-coordinate of the first control point.

entries.signature: public void RArcTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint r, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, SkiaSharp.SKPoint xy);

fields.summary: Appends an arc relative to the current point.

params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the x-axis in degrees.
params.r: The arc radii as a point (rx, ry).
params.largeArc: The arc size flag indicating whether to use the large arc.
params.sweep: The sweep direction of the arc.
params.xy: The end point of the arc.

entries.signature: public void RArcTo (float rx, float ry, float xAxisRotate, SkiaSharp.SKPathArcSize largeArc, SkiaSharp.SKPathDirection sweep, float x, float y);

fields.summary: Appends an arc relative to the current point.

params.largeArc: The arc size flag indicating whether to use the large arc.
params.xAxisRotate: The rotation of the x-axis in degrees.
params.ry: The y-axis radius of the arc.
params.rx: The x-axis radius of the arc.
params.sweep: The sweep direction of the arc.

entries.signature: public void RConicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a conic curve relative to the current point.

params.point1: The first tangent point for the arc.
params.w: The weight of the conic curve (affects the curve's shape).

entries.signature: public void RConicTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1, float w);

fields.summary: Appends a conic curve relative to the current point.

params.dx1: The horizontal offset of the second point.
params.dy0: The vertical offset of the first control point.
params.w: The weight of the conic curve (affects the curve's shape).
params.dy1: The vertical offset of the second point.
params.dx0: The horizontal offset of the first control point.

entries.signature: public void RCubicTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point2);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bézier curve relative to the current point.

params.point1: The first tangent point for the arc.
params.point2: The second tangent point and end point for the arc.

entries.signature: public void RCubicTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1, float dx2, float dy2);

fields.summary: Appends a cubic Bézier curve relative to the current point.

params.dx1: The horizontal offset of the second point.
params.dx0: The horizontal offset of the first control point.
params.dy2: The vertical offset of the third point.
params.dy0: The vertical offset of the first control point.
params.dx2: The horizontal offset of the third point.
params.dy1: The vertical offset of the second point.

entries.signature: public void Reset ();

fields.summary: Resets the builder to an empty state.

entries.signature: public void ReverseAddPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath other);

fields.summary: Appends the elements of the specified path in reverse order to the builder.

params.other: The path whose elements are added to this builder.

entries.signature: public void RLineTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Appends a line segment relative to the current point.

entries.signature: public void RLineTo (float dx, float dy);

fields.summary: Appends a line segment relative to the current point.

entries.signature: public void RMoveTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point);

fields.summary: Sets the beginning of the next contour at an offset from the current point.

entries.signature: public void RMoveTo (float dx, float dy);

fields.summary: Sets the beginning of the next contour at an offset from the current point.

entries.signature: public void RQuadTo (SkiaSharp.SKPoint point0, SkiaSharp.SKPoint point1);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bézier curve relative to the current point.

params.point1: The first tangent point for the arc.

entries.signature: public void RQuadTo (float dx0, float dy0, float dx1, float dy1);

fields.summary: Appends a quadratic Bézier curve relative to the current point.

params.dx1: The horizontal offset of the second point.
params.dy0: The vertical offset of the first control point.
params.dy1: The vertical offset of the second point.
params.dx0: The horizontal offset of the first control point.

entries.signature: public SkiaSharp.SKPath Snapshot ();

fields.summary: Returns a snapshot of the current path without resetting the builder.
fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPath" /> containing the path that was built.
